message:
feat(core): let-chain refactor in event bus + journal placeholder feature gate

- scripting/events: refactor fire() fire_count update to use Rust 2024
  let-chain syntax (if let + && guard in single expression), reducing
  nesting depth while preserving identical behavior
- Cargo.toml: add __journal_types_placeholder feature gate for test
  files that reference not-yet-implemented journal/tx types, allowing
  conditional compilation without breaking the build

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -480,6 +480,8 @@ redis-session = [
 ]
 # Feature gate for cross_agent_session_resumer integration (vendored IR types).
 session-resume = []
+# Placeholder feature gate for test files referencing unimplemented types (journal, tx, etc.)
+__journal_types_placeholder = []
 # Feature gate for generic subprocess bridge foundation.
 subprocess-bridge = []
 # Feature gate for mcp_agent_mail_rust coordination bridge.
